editHint: Canceling will not delete subsequent messages. Press Cmd/Ctrl + Enter to send directly.

approval.approveInFooter: Please approve or reject in the fixed bar at the bottom of the conversation area.
approval.approvalPaused: The main process or sub-agent has paused; it will continue and summarize results after you approve or reject these tool calls.
approval.allowWorkspaceSimilar: Allow similar commands in this workspace going forward
approval.autoApprovalTitle: Currently in auto-approval mode; click to switch to manual approval
approval.manualApprovalTitle: Currently in manual approval mode; click to switch to auto-approval

streaming.tip1: Cross-referencing context, messages, tool results, and thread state to minimize unnecessary back-and-forth.
streaming.tip2: Will first compress the most valuable next step, then decide whether to continue searching, modifying, or verifying.
streaming.tip3: If the issue has converged to a local slice, will prioritize small changes and verify immediately.
streaming.tip4: Will continuously organize clues, risks, and completed actions during processing, rather than only outputting intermediate fragments.
streaming.tip5: If this round involves tool chains, file changes, and the context window, their mutual impact scope will be synchronized.
streaming.tip6: Currently displaying processing status tips; actual results will continue streaming via messages and tool calls.
streaming.completedSteps: {{count}} processing steps completed; will prioritize closing remaining actions and verification loops next.
streaming.remainingSteps: {{count}} steps remaining; continuing in dependency order without uncontrolled expansion.
streaming.workspaceContext: Leveraging file relationships and recent changes in workspace {{name}} to guide next actions.
streaming.workspaceFiles: {{count}} file nodes visible in the current workspace; prioritizing falsifiable local clues.
streaming.referencedPaths: Prioritizing the {{count}} file paths you referenced to avoid context drift and redundant searches.
streaming.recentTools: Currently chaining tools like {{tools}} to compress search, modification, and verification into the same round.
streaming.currentModel: {{label}} is handling this round of reasoning, tool calls, and result organization.
streaming.messageCount: {{count}} messages accumulated in the current thread; state will continue from existing context without restarting.
streaming.autoApprovalMode: Currently in auto-approval mode; low-risk actions proceed directly, reducing workflow interruptions.
streaming.manualApprovalMode: Currently in manual approval mode; high-impact tools pause at confirmation points for clear execution boundaries.
streaming.pendingApproval: Workflow paused at {{name}} confirmation point; will continue summarizing after approval or rejection.
streaming.interruptSend: Interrupt send (queued; will auto-submit after current reply completes)

emptyState.startFromWorkspace: Start driving toward a clear outcome from this workspace
emptyState.connectedWorkspace: You've connected a workspace. Jarvis can now read code, modify files, execute commands, and organize the process into trackable results.
emptyState.agentNeedsWorkspace: The agent needs a workspace to create and modify files

error.tryResend: You can try sending a new message to continue the conversation.
error.contextWindowFull: Context window is full (approx. {{usedK}}K / {{maxK}}K tokens). The conversation is too long; please start a new session to continue.
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait before sending another message.
error.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your API key in settings.

deleteConfirm.title: Confirm delete message?
deleteConfirm.description: This will delete the {{role}} message and all subsequent messages. This action cannot be undone.
deleteConfirm.noTextContent: This message has no displayable text content.

toast.resendNotFound: Message to resend not found. Please switch sessions and try again.
toast.resendFailed: Failed to resend message. Please try again later.
toast.editNotFound: Message to edit not found. Please switch sessions and try again.
toast.editSendFailed: Failed to send edited message. Please try again later.
toast.deleteNotFound: Message to delete not found. Please switch sessions and try again.
toast.deleteFailed: Failed to delete message. Please try again later.

selectWorkspaceFirst: Please select a workspace folder before sending a message.
copyMarkdownTitle: Copy all messages in this session as Markdown (including tool calls and results)

inputPlaceholder.idle: Type a message... Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line, @ to reference files
inputPlaceholder.loading: Type to interrupt... Enter to queue, will auto-submit after current reply completes

contextUsage.estimateNote: Current input tokens use real-time estimates, including visible messages and hidden prompts; this can reflect the latest context usage faster after session compression.

workspacePicker.agentReadWrite: The agent will read and write files in this folder.
workspacePicker.selectFolderDesc: Select the agent's working directory. Files will be read from and written to this location.

modelSwitcher.needCustomModel: Please add at least one custom model configuration (Base URL and Model ID)

thinkingSection.summaryFallback: Thinking complete. Click to expand for details.

thinkBlock.thinkSummaryFallback: Thinking complete. Click to expand and view details.
